image_resolution.source: RoboTwin/policy/ACT/act_policy.py resizes to (480,640) HWC; resnet18 backbone consumes 480x640 directly

max_episode_steps.source: RoboTwin 2.0 default step_lim for Easy tasks

control_mode.source: RoboTwin ALOHA bimanual joint-pos control; ACT predicts qpos targets

obs_mode.source: RoboTwin default; ACT trained on RGB cameras

prompt_format.source: ACT is non-language-conditioned (DETR-CVAE on images + qpos only)

image_flip_180deg.source: RoboTwin upright cameras; no flip needed

image_resize_before_model.source: policy_server resizes HWC -> (480,640) then CHW /255 before sending to ACT

center_crop.source: ACT training in RoboTwin uses no center_crop

gripper_post_processing.value: raw 14D bimanual qpos (left arm 6+1 + right arm 6+1)
gripper_post_processing.source: Avada11 ACT trained on 14D bimanual joint-pos; no special gripper rescaling

unnorm_key.source: ACT uses dataset_stats.pkl mean/std loaded from ckpt_dir; not an index key

state_dim.source: RoboTwin sends 14D bimanual qpos; ACT state_dim=14 from deploy_policy.yml action_dim

action_dim.source: RoboTwin take_action accepts 14D; ACT predicts 14D action chunks

required_obs_keys.source: policy_server.py _convert_obs maps these client keys to upstream {head_cam,left_cam,right_cam,qpos}

obs_wrapper.source: RoboTwin run_eval_ws.py emits flat dict on the wire

train_seed_range.value: 100,200,300 (training seed labels per dir; not RoboTwin scene seeds)
train_seed_range.source: Avada11/RoboTwin-Model-AgileX-ACT subdirs <pretrain>.<eval>/demo_clean-100/{100,200,300}/ — these are model training seeds, orthogonal to RoboTwin eval seeds (100000+)
